text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Winning Ticket is walking by herself
near the river.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Wh-why am I at the river? How'd I get here?!
Someone please tell meeee!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: No one's here so I won't get an answer. Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Let's see—there was this old lady at the station,
and she was lost...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
So I took her where she needed to go, but then
things went all wrong!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I followed the street back where I came... So
how'd I end up at the river?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By the time she makes it back to the academy,
she's exhausted, and it's already dark.
